error_signature: replying with JSON in the chatbox
title: Chatbox replying with JSON instead of a message
symptom: After saving information to Google Sheets, the chatbox responds with JSON data instead of a user-friendly message.
applies_when: Data is saved to Google Sheets
not_this_if: Chatbox is configured to return a custom message
root_cause: The trigger node is set to default mode, which returns the raw data from the last node instead of a formatted response. This leads to the chatbox displaying JSON instead of a user-friendly confirmation message.
fix_steps: Change the mode from default to 'Using Response Nodes'
Attach a Chat node at the end of the workflow
Test the workflow to ensure the chatbox responds correctly
agent_instruction: Change the trigger node mode to 'Using Response Nodes' and attach a Chat node.
